That drop opened my mind to an onchain art movement that was just beginning. On June 3, I return with [GLiFS.art](https://t.co/Yy7ShJrymq) This time, the collection won’t be complete without your participation.

ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.
Crypto’s mascot. We took Pengu to the Art Museum
is now listed on 130+ exchanges and is tradable across 6+ chains, reaching hundreds of millions of users daily. Here’s why that’s important

Today, is listed across global exchanges and apps in nearly every major region! You can find on OpenSea, Binance, Upbit, Coinbase, OKX, Busha, Rain, Revolut, Kraken, Robinhood, Ripio, Mercado Bitcoin, Crypto(dot)com, and many more.

is also tradable cross-chain on ETH, Solana, Abstract, HyperEVM, NEAR, and BNB. OFT is a critical part of this infrastructure, and helps keeps as one unified token that moves across ecosystems without fragmentation.
